creator: rafan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: rafan->portmgr

As discussed with submitter and maintainer, we request the following copy: 

x11-toolkits/ruby18-fox -> x11-toolkits/ruby18-fox10 
x11-toolkits/ruby18-fox-devel -> x11-toolkits/ruby18-fox12 

for future fox14 and fox16 ports. ruby18-fox is unmaintainer, ruby18-fox-devel 
is maintainerd with the same maintainer of this one.
